data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the existence of a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the functionality of this interface. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or operation, there is a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for mini booking interface
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and functionality of the mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.
